framework.name: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol
framework.description: A standardized protocol enabling AI agents to discover, communicate, and collaborate with other agents dynamically. Built on top of HTTP/JSON-RPC, it defines agent cards (capability advertisements), task specifications, and interaction patterns including clarifying questions and streaming responses. Distinct from Model Context Protocol (MCP) which handles agent-to-tool communication.
framework.raw_quote: A2A is a protocol which allows AI agents to communicate with each other in a standardized way
